channel.title: My Little Pony Chinese Podcast
channel.description: NotebookLM-generated discussion of Chinese episodes of My Little Pony
channel.itunes:author: Gerald Pho
channel.itunes:summary: NotebookLM-generated discussion of Chinese episodes of My Little Pony
channel.itunes:subtitle: My Little Pony Chinese Podcast

item.title: MLP S1E1 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 1 | 用派对拯救世界
item.description: Twilight Sparkle arrives in Ponyville to oversee the Summer Sun Celebration, but a forgotten warning about Nightmare Moon turns a routine visit into the start of a larger crisis.
item.itunes:summary: Twilight Sparkle arrives in Ponyville to oversee the Summer Sun Celebration, but a forgotten warning about Nightmare Moon turns a routine visit into the start of a larger crisis.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E1 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 1 | 用派对拯救世界

item.title: MLP S1E2 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 2 | 用友谊战胜梦魇之月
item.description: Twilight and her new friends journey into the Everfree Forest, recover the Elements of Harmony, and defeat Nightmare Moon, turning a looming disaster into the foundation of their friendship.
item.itunes:summary: Twilight and her new friends journey into the Everfree Forest, recover the Elements of Harmony, and defeat Nightmare Moon, turning a looming disaster into the foundation of their friendship.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E2 | Friendship Is Magic, Part 2 | 用友谊战胜梦魇之月

item.title: MLP S1E3 | The Ticket Master | 小马宝莉门票里的五个词
item.description: Twilight Sparkle receives two Grand Galloping Gala tickets and watches her friends compete for them, learning how quickly generosity, pressure, and expectations can strain a friendship.
item.itunes:summary: Twilight Sparkle receives two Grand Galloping Gala tickets and watches her friends compete for them, learning how quickly generosity, pressure, and expectations can strain a friendship.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E3 | The Ticket Master | 小马宝莉门票里的五个词

item.title: MLP S1E4 | Applebuck Season | 拒绝求助的代价
item.description: Applejack tries to harvest Sweet Apple Acres alone after Big McIntosh is injured, but exhaustion and pride turn her promises to help around Ponyville into a chain of disasters.
item.itunes:summary: Applejack tries to harvest Sweet Apple Acres alone after Big McIntosh is injured, but exhaustion and pride turn her promises to help around Ponyville into a chain of disasters.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E4 | Applebuck Season | 拒绝求助的代价

item.title: MLP S1E5 | Griffon the Brush Off | 简单词看透社交真相
item.description: Pinkie Pie and Rainbow Dash bond over pranks until Rainbow Dash's rude griffon friend Gilda arrives, forcing Rainbow to decide what kind of friendship she wants to keep.
item.itunes:summary: Pinkie Pie and Rainbow Dash bond over pranks until Rainbow Dash's rude griffon friend Gilda arrives, forcing Rainbow to decide what kind of friendship she wants to keep.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E5 | Griffon the Brush Off | 简单词看透社交真相

item.title: MLP S1E6 | Boast Busters | 基础才是真魔法
item.description: Trixie dazzles Ponyville with theatrical magic and humiliates Twilight's friends, but when an Ursa Minor appears, Twilight solves the crisis and exposes the difference between real skill and empty boasting.
item.itunes:summary: Trixie dazzles Ponyville with theatrical magic and humiliates Twilight's friends, but when an Ursa Minor appears, Twilight solves the crisis and exposes the difference between real skill and empty boasting.
item.itunes:subtitle: MLP S1E6 | Boast Busters | 基础才是真魔法
